reasoning: Query asks specifically about last-mile bus access to Shirakawa-go and train-bus transfer timing. reasoning: User asks specifically about Nagasaki tram (路面電車) coverage of central sights. Tool returned a prefecture-wide hub list including remote Tsushima / Hirado / Shimabara, with rail station info only. No tram-line information surfaced. RULE B applied to constraint_handling.
